prompt: I have a Stream Deck Plus and want a plugin that shows my computer's CPU usage, RAM usage, and network activity on the first 3 encoder dials. Rotating a dial should do nothing (read-only display), but pressing any dial should refresh all stats immediately. The touch strip should show a bar graph of the current value. Build the full plugin.
assertions: manifest.json has 3 encoder actions with Controllers including Encoder
Each encoder action has Encoder.layout set (e.g. $A1)
Each action calls action.setFeedback() with an indicator field
action.isDial() guard present before setFeedback calls
Node os module used to read system stats
Polling interval set up in plugin.ts
